stemHtml: During the cruise phase of flight, ATC issues an ammended clearance. For several minutes both pilots directed all their attention on re-entering the route and checking the navigation settings. Which statement best characterizes this scenario?

options.b: Both pilots were confused by the en-route clearance change.
options.c: The pilots demonstrated effective situational awareness throughout the flight.
options.d: The pilots failed to properly manage their tasks and temporarily lost situational awareness.
